name: Buck-Eye Balls
recipeInstructions:
1 Line a cookie sheet with wax paper.
2 Mix peanut butter, vanilla, sugar and butter together to form a smooth dough.
3 Shape into 1-inch balls. Refrigerate.
4 Melt chocolate and shortening together until smooth.
5 Pour melted mixture into a small bowl.
6 Dip three-quarters of each ball in the chocolate.
7 Return the dipped balls to the refrigerator.
